content.claim: The distinction between SNI and BTMN categories reflects severity and etiology: SNI learning disorders involve neurological/nervous-system deviation, while BTMN involves pedagogical and psychological factors without neurological deviation
content.context: Fresh live research through the Education finance lens
limitations: International comparability is limited because BTMN is a Hungarian-specific category
The boundary between 'neurological deviation' and 'pedagogical/psychological factors' is not formally defined in sources
No diagnostic criterion algorithm provided to assess misclassification risk across categories
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
